requirement_topic.en: Grid voltage and frequency — nominal system voltage
requirement_topic.zh: 电网电压与频率——额定系统电压
requirement_topic.zht: 電網電壓與頻率——額定系統電壓

summary.en: Tonga’s utility network is operated at 240/415 V (single/three-phase), 50 Hz, consistent with many island utility legacy profiles. Tonga Power Limited (TPL) interconnection specifications require BESS PCS and balance-of-system electrical interfaces to be configured and rated for 240/415 V operation. China’s grid is 220/380 V 50 Hz — frequency matches, but nominal voltage differs.
summary.zh: 汤加电网运行于240/415V（单/三相）、50Hz。汤加电力有限公司（TPL）并网规范要求BESS储能变流器和系统级电气接口按240/415V运行并进行配置。中国国内电网为220/380V 50Hz——频率一致但额定电压不同。
summary.zht: 湯加電網運行於240/415V（單/三相）、50Hz。湯加電力有限公司（TPL）併網規範要求BESS儲能變流器和系統級電氣介面按240/415V運行並進行配置。中國國內電網為220/380V 50Hz——頻率一致但額定電壓不同。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-3-1:2018 (EES systems — environmental and grid adaptation requirements)
TPL Tonga interconnection guidance (as updated for project scope)

summary.en: China standard grid voltage is 220/380 V 50 Hz via GB/T 12325 and GB/T 15945. Many Chinese BESS PCS units are configured and certified for domestic 220/380 V. Tonga deployment requires 240/415 V variant adaptation, transformer arrangement, and revised tuning for protection relays and harmonics.
summary.zh: 中国标准电网电压为220/380V 50Hz，对应GB/T 12325和GB/T 15945。许多中国BESS变流器按220/380V配置和认证。汤加部署需要采用240/415V变型、变压器配套以及保护定值和谐波处理重新调校。
summary.zht: 中國標準電網電壓為220/380V 50Hz，對應GB/T 12325和GB/T 15945。許多中國BESS變流器按220/380V配置和認證。湯加部署需要採用240/415V變型、變壓器配套以及保護定值與諧波處理重新調校。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 12325-2008 (Power quality — deviation of supply voltage)

gap.en: VOLTAGE GAP: Tonga 240/415 V versus China 220/380 V. Frequency is 50 Hz in both systems, but nominal voltage differs by approximately 9%. PCS hardware settings, transformer ratios, protection settings, and nameplate ratings must be redesigned or reconfigured for 240/415 V operation. This is not a simple firmware swap — it affects engineering scope and certification evidence.
gap.zh: 电压差距：汤加240/415V对比中国220/380V。两者频率均为50Hz，但额定电压约差9%。BESS储能变流器硬件设定、变压器变比、保护定值与铭牌额定均需重新设计或改造以适应240/415V。该调整并非仅改固件，还影响工程范围与认证材料。
gap.zht: 電壓差距：湯加240/415V對比中國220/380V。兩者頻率均為50Hz，但額定電壓約差9%。BESS儲能變流器硬件設置、變壓器變比、保護定值與銘牌額定均需重新設計或改造以適應240/415V。該調整並非僅改韌體，亦影響工程範圍與認證文件。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Standard Chinese BESS PCS units rated for 220/380 V cannot be directly connected to Tonga’s 240/415 V grid without hardware adaptation, re-rating, or approved transformer stage integration. Exporters must provide a 240/415 V-rated configuration with TPL-reviewed protection and control assumptions before grid-connection documentation can be accepted.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 标准额定220/380V的中国BESS储能变流器不能直接接入汤加240/415V电网，须进行硬件适配、重新额定或加装变压器级并重新核定。必须提供符合240/415V的配置，并包含TPL审阅后的保护与控制假设，方可接受并网文档。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 標準額定220/380V的中國BESS儲能變流器不能直接接入湯加240/415V電網，須進行硬件適配、重新額定或加裝變壓器級並重新核定。必須提供符合240/415V的配置，並包含TPL審閱後的保護與控制假設，方可接受併網文件。

requirement_topic.en: Grid-connection technical requirements — IEC 62933 system compliance
requirement_topic.zh: 并网技术要求——IEC 62933系统合规
requirement_topic.zht: 併網技術要求——IEC 62933系統合規

summary.en: TPL interconnection and emerging Tonga technical guidance reference IEC 62933 series (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) for power quality, anti-islanding, protection coordination, and system safety requirements. Project documents generally require IEC 62933 evidence in addition to interconnection drawings.
summary.zh: TPL并网和汤加新建技术指导中，通常以IEC 62933系列（电化学储能系统）为基础管理电能质量、防孤岛、保护协调和系统安全要求。项目文件通常要求提供IEC 62933证据并附并网图纸。
summary.zht: TPL併網和湯加新建技術指引中，通常以IEC 62933系列（電化學儲能系統）為基礎管理電能品質、防孤島、保護協調和系統安全要求。項目文件通常要求提供IEC 62933證據並附併網圖紙。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2:2020 (Safety requirements for grid-integrated EES systems)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 36558-2022 (BESS grid-connection technical requirements) and GB/T 34131-2017 as domestic technical baseline documents. These are relevant but not accepted as direct equivalents in Tonga projects without explicit crosswalk evidence. Test reports are typically documented for China domestic interconnection assumptions.
summary.zh: 中国以GB/T 36558-2022（储能系统并网技术规定）和GB/T 34131-2017作为国内技术基线。这些文件有参考价值，但汤加项目不接受其直接等同，除非提供明确对照证据。测试报告通常是基于中国并网工况生成。
summary.zht: 中國以GB/T 36558-2022（儲能系統併網技術規定）和GB/T 34131-2017作為國內技術基線。這些文件有參考價值，但湯加項目不接受其直接等同，除非提供明確對照證據。測試報告通常是基於中國併網工況生成。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34131-2017 (Electrochemical energy storage for power stations)

gap.en: GB/T 36558 and GB/T 34131 provide useful domestic references but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC 62933 in Tonga/NOC review workflows. Exporters must provide IEC 62933 series reports and TPL-reviewed technical assessments at Tonga operating conditions. Retesting or at least revalidation may be required for 240/415 V settings.
gap.zh: GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131可为国内参考，但在汤加/公用事业审查中不被接受为IEC 62933的替代。出口商须提供IEC 62933系列测试报告和符合汤加运行条件的TPL审查技术评估。对240/415V工况可能需要重新测试或复核。
gap.zht: GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131可作為國內參考，但在湯加/公用事業審查中不被接受為IEC 62933的替代。出口商須提供IEC 62933系列測試報告和符合湯加運行條件的TPL審查技術評估。對240/415V工況可能需要重新測試或複核。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for utility-scale project interconnection in Tonga
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 36558 mandatory domestically; not equivalent to IEC 62933 for Tonga

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62933 series compliance evidence is required for Tonga utility-level interconnection review. Standard domestic GB/T 36558 and GB/T 34131 packages are insufficient on their own because Tonga review uses IEC-aligned and interconnection-condition-specific evaluation at 240/415 V. Prepare IEC test and engineering evidence package before interconnection submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 汤加电网接入审查要求IEC 62933系列证据。单独依赖国内GB/T 36558与GB/T 34131文件不足以满足汤加审查，因为汤加采用IEC对齐并结合240/415V工况的并网条件评估。请在提交并网申请前先准备IEC测试和工程证明包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 湯加電網接入審查要求IEC 62933系列證據。單獨依賴國內GB/T 36558與GB/T 34131文件不足以滿足湯加審查，因為湯加採用IEC對齊並結合240/415V工況的併網條件評估。請在提交併網申請前先準備IEC測試及工程證明包。

requirement_topic.en: Coastal environmental derating — heat and humidity
requirement_topic.zh: 沿海环境降额——热与湿度
requirement_topic.zht: 沿海環境降額——熱與濕度

summary.en: Tonga is a tropical island environment with persistent humidity, elevated temperatures, and marine corrosion exposure. TPL project approvals generally require derating and enclosure/environment planning references equivalent to IEC 60068 and IEC 62933 environmental requirements, especially for outdoor BESS plants near Nuku'alofa coastal load pockets.
summary.zh: 汤加是热带海岛环境，常年高湿、高温及海洋腐蚀暴露。TPL项目批准通常要求按IEC 60068与IEC 62933环境要求进行降额和外壳环境规划，尤其是临近努库阿洛法海岸负荷区的室外BESS场站。
summary.zht: 湯加是熱帶海島環境，常年高濕、高溫及海洋腐蝕暴露。TPL項目批准通常要求按IEC 60068與IEC 62933環境要求進行降額和外殼環境規劃，尤其是臨近努庫阿洛法海岸負荷區的室外BESS廠站。

summary.en: Chinese products commonly use GB/T 36276 and GB/T 2423 environmental test standards for inland and mild coastal conditions. Salt-mist and tropical maritime derating is not always certified to Tonga-level exposure intensity for every product line.
summary.zh: 中国产品通常按GB/T 36276和GB/T 2423环境试验标准用于内陆或轻度沿海条件。并非每个产品线都有按汤加强度级别的盐雾和热带海洋降额认证。
summary.zht: 中國產品通常按GB/T 36276和GB/T 2423環境試驗標準用於內陸或輕度沿海條件。並非每個產品線都有按湯加強度級別的鹽霧和熱帶海洋降額認證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-ion battery for electric energy storage)

gap.en: For direct marine-exposure BESS deployments in Tonga, Chinese certification bundles may not include the salt-mist cyclic levels and operational derating profiles expected by utility-led project acceptance. IP class, cooling control strategy, and weatherproofing documentation should be validated under Tonga-specific conditions.
gap.zh: 对于在汤加直接处于海洋环境中的BESS部署，中文认证包可能不包含汤加预期的盐雾循环等级和运行降额曲线。须在汤加工况下验证防护等级、冷却控制策略与防候条件文件。
gap.zht: 對於在湯加直接處於海洋環境中的BESS部署，中國認證包可能不包含湯加預期的鹽霧循環等級與運行降額曲線。須在湯加工況下驗證防護等級、冷卻控制策略與防候條件文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for project-specific environmental acceptance in Tonga
mandatory_status.cn: Partial — GB test levels exist but may not match marine project scope

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] BESS units deployed in Tonga’s marine climate generally require documentation beyond base GB/T 36276 claims: validated IEC 60068-2-52 performance against required levels, NPSH/temperature derating curves, and enclosure design evidence (often IP55+) suitable for coastal installation. This gap is commonly resolved with environmental requalification rather than full product redesign.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 部署于汤加海洋气候下的BESS通常需在GB/T 36276基础之外补充材料：针对要求等级的IEC 60068-2-52验证、功率/容量温升降额曲线、且适用于海边安装的防护外壳证明（常见IP55+）。该差距通常通过环境复验而非整机重设计解决。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 部署於湯加海洋氣候下的BESS通常需在GB/T 36276基礎之外補充文件：針對要求等級的IEC 60068-2-52驗證、功率/容量溫升降額曲線，以及適用於海邊安裝的防護外殼證明（常見IP55+）。該差距通常透過環境復驗而非整機重設計解決。
